response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-04:39: Kobo Kanaeru introduces her birthday merchandise. No music. 2. 04:39-04:58: Kobo Kanaeru performs 'Fond Memories'. Identified song title from search. Lyrics found on multiple sites. The song is written by Kobo Kanaeru. The song is in Indonesian. Lyrics formatted.
response.global_summary: The video is an announcement by VTuber Kobo Kanaeru regarding her 2025 birthday merchandise set. It includes a musical performance of her original song 'Fond Memories'.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru introduces her birthday merchandise set 2025 with on-screen text listing the items.

Kobo Kanaeru performs her song 'Fond Memories' on a stage with a background featuring stars and a rainbow. Title appears on screen as 'Sweet Memories' (which is the song's subtitle/alternate title 'Fond Memories').
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The sound of rain that touches memories, listen
This longing that tortures me
Cannot escape from the leaning of time, oh love
Do you remember?
The echo of the empty room at that time, you called me
"If only you knew, your presence..."
Your voice buzzed in my mind
Come back~ cannot bear missing you
My love, at your smile
If only, this body remained in a dream
The echo of the empty room at that time, you were... 
"Smile, my love, when I leave"
Cannot bear to, separate, forget, fond memories...
Come back~ cannot bear missing you
My love, at your smile
If only, this body remained in a dream
Return~ return~ return don't go!
Return return...
Return~ return~ return don't go...
Return! Return! Return don't go!
(Go my love, after your sadness)
Return! Return... (Don't keep getting trapped...)
Return! Return! Return don't go!
(I will accompany you forever)
I won't forget you!
Come back!
Cannot bear missing you
My love, at your smile
If only this body remained in a dream.
Come back! (I'm home)
Cannot bear missing you (Take care of yourself)
My love, at your smile (My love, I miss your smile)
If only this body remained in a dream (If you let go and leave...)
